lks2.objective: Create passing options with two teammates to knock down a central cone — one defender protects it for 60 seconds.
successCriteria: Attackers spread to form a triangle
Defender stays goal-side of the cone

uks2.objective: Move off the ball to create passing angles — combine quick passes with deception to break the defender's line of sight to the cone.
successCriteria: Triangle shape is maintained even after passes
Defender adjusts position based on ball location

space.description: Small playing area per group of 4. Tall cone in the centre with a 'no entry' circle around it. Players stay outside the circle.

steps: Split into groups of 4 — three attackers vs one defender.
Place the kingpin cone in the middle of a small area, with a small no-entry circle around it.
The three attackers combine (passing) to create an opportunity to knock down the cone.
The defender protects the cone for 60 seconds.
No players are allowed inside the circle area — attackers must shoot from outside.
questions: How can you let your teammate know you want to receive the ball?
What shape should the attacking team create to make options for the player on the ball? (Triangle)
As a defender, should your main aim be to defend the ball or the cone?

step.space: Make an outer area for the attackers to remain in (no roaming)
step.task: Play by passing with hands OR with feet
step.equipment: Add more cones in the central area (multiple kingpins to defend)
step.people: Add more or fewer attackers or defenders
